summary: A doctest in doc/callbacks.rst failed at line 48 due to output mismatch. The main pytest test suite passed (39699 tests), but documentation testing revealed an assertion failure during the CI job.
root_cause: Doctest in doc/callbacks.rst at line 48 failed with DocTestFailure—the expected output did not match the actual output (Got: LogisticRegression())

evidence.reason: Explicitly identifies the doctest that failed
Shows the exact file path and line number where the doctest assertion failed
Shows the actual output produced did not match the expected output in the doctest
Confirms the job exited with failure status due to the doctest failure

suggested_fix: Update the expected output in the doctest at line 48 of doc/callbacks.rst to match the actual output, or investigate why the code is producing LogisticRegression() when a different output was expected

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
